value_chain_position: High-density power management ICs for AI servers — specializes in integrated voltage regulators (IVRs) and point-of-load converters that power GPU/accelerator boards in AI data centers.
relative_comps: MPWR is the highest-growth pure analog company in the AI data-center supply chain; its 48V to point-of-load architecture is uniquely suited to NVDA GB200 NVL racks. Revenue grew 24% YoY and the data-center segment is accelerating. TXN and ADI compete in power management but lack MPWR's focus and design wins in hyperscaler GPU racks. MPWR trades at ~65x forward earnings — a steep premium to analog peers that prices in AI server content-per-unit growth as a multi-year tailwind.
